title: The Negotiation Cycle for Software Requirements
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical and collaborative process of negotiating requirements between stakeholders and the development team to reach a mutually agreeable set of project specifications.
relationships: Stakeholders provide Initial Requirements to the Project Team
Team analyzes requirements and Identifies Constraints & Conflicts
Team and Stakeholders collaborate on Proposed Alternatives & Trade-offs
Parties reach a Negotiated Agreement through discussion
Agreement is documented into a Formalized Requirements Document
Cycle can repeat if new constraints are found during formalization
